chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-533 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.2278/2026. 2. For orders on Misc. No.2279/2026. 3. For orders on Misc. No.2280/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026. Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner states under instructions that the Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith all pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
